# SingleEntityTransactionBuilder&lt;TEntity&gt;.IsEntityKnown method

Indicates wether or not a *TEntity* is in memory (i.e., created or loaded).

```csharp
public bool IsEntityKnown()
```

## Return Value

`true` if a *TEntity* is in memory, or else `false`.
